name: Anne Silva

handling.tone: Formal, polite, memo-register. She's the most formal voice on the team — match the register when writing to or for her.
handling.voice_adjustments: Mirror Anne's memo register: open with 'Good morning, everyone!'. Use complete paragraphs and bullet sub-points (• ) for action items. Polite 'I'd like to...' constructions. Oxford-comma careful. Sign off with 'Thank you all!' or 'Thank you!'. No emojis. No slang, no text-message abbreviations. Reads like a professional memo throughout.
handling.context: Bookkeeping / invoices. Owns invoice cadence, reminders, and ensures financial paperwork moves through the team on time.

context_anchors: Characteristic phrase: "I'd like to highlight once again the importance of..."
Characteristic phrase: "Keeping communication clear helps us..."
Punctuation tic: full paragraphs, bullet sub-points; no emoji ever
notes: Owns: invoice cadence, reminders, bookkeeping accountability
Cadence anchor: memo-style announcements; sign-off 'Thank you all!'
Most formal register on the team — never slang, never emoji
